title: I Am Allowed in the Room Where the Investments Are Decided
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that investing belongs to a different category of person
excerpt: A short energy statement for the exclusion feeling around investing. The release names the belief that investing is for someone else; the allow names permission to be present in those decisions.
sourceNotes: Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the belief that investment choices belong to someone else. Someone richer, older, more sure, more practised with money. The release names being shut out of the room. The allow gives permission to sit at the table.

I am ready to release every story that says investment decisions belong to a different kind of person, that I am not financially savvy enough, that I came from the wrong background, that I need to understand more before I am allowed to begin. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow my place in the room where money decisions are made, including investment decisions, and the capacity to begin where I am, with what I have, without waiting for a level of readiness that only comes after starting. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
